description: Your team's CI/CD pipeline requires a local Docker registry for air-gapped deployments. Set up a local Docker registry (registry:2) on port 5000. Build the Python API service located at /home/ga/api-service/ and push it to the local registry with tags 'localhost:5000/api-service:v1.0.0' and 'localhost:5000/api-service:latest'. Deploy the service using a docker-compose.yml file at /home/ga/api-service/docker-compose.yml that references the registry image (no build directive) and ensures the API is accessible on port 7080. Login: ga / password123
